title: Gunpla Cobalt Drill Bits 2mm 10-Pieces, M35 HSS Metric Straight Shank Jobber Drill Bit Set with Plastic Case for Hardened Stainless Steel, Metal, Aluminium, Tile, Wood, Plastic and Cast Iron…
features: STRONGLY MADE: Gunpla cobalt drill bits are design with incredibly strong HSS M35 cobalt for frequent and intense use. These m35 hss drill bits can withstand high heat temperatures, they easily perform during longer periods without cooling or needing fluid cutting

HIGH SPEED AND ACCURATE OPERATION: Our hardened drill bits are engineered tough enough to survive during years. They can be operated at up to 1500 RPM, fast speed, providing control, precision and comfort during use

TWIST DESIGN AND GREAT PERFORMANCE: With their copper oxide finish, these heat resistant drill bits are designed to keep their form no matter the frequency with which they are used. The perfect twist design finish also enables smooth perforation and clean holes during your projects

WIDE APPLICATION: M35 Cobalt HSS drill bits are purposely forged to work on hardened materials. Mainly used in cutting through hard metals such as steel, stainless steel, cast iron, high temperature alloy, titanium alloy, hard plastics and woods, and also can be used for softer materials

PACKAGE CONTENT: The Gunpla cobalt drill bit set comprises 10 pieces of 2mm hardened drill bits, which are all placed with precision and smoothness. so as to make sure the bits do not slip off and are easily placed during your work
description: Product Description Gunpla is an established world manufacturer and supplier of hand tools and home improvement products. Our engineers always strive to provide the most complete, durable and high quality tools to help in your daily projects. Our target is to provide well-designed and cost-effective tools to customers all over the world. Make Gunpla Tools be part of your life. Gunpla Cobalt Drill Bits 2.0mm Gunpla Cobalt drill bits are engineered and given the capacity to cut through all types of metal, including high temperature alloy, titanium alloy stainless steel and cast iron and even hard plastics and woods. These hardened drill bits are designed and made of cobalt, which makes them strong and give them the ability to withstand long and strenuous use. Crafted to be primarily used on metal, these premium drilling tools can also be used on or for softer materials. They are tough, making them the ideal tools when most drills won’t be. 118 Degree Split Point Drilling into harder materials become a child's play during your daily use. These split point self-centering drill bits are designed to drill without wandering around on the surface Perfect Size Gunpla cobalt drill bits have a full length of 49mm, with the flute length at 24mm and the 2.0mm of diameter, easily drill holes into the toughest types of metals. Accurate Bits Centering Crafted with round shanks, these 10 premium quality drill will be perfectly centered into your drill's chuck for more accurate use. Create Clean Holes Gunpla cobalt drill bits do not only pierce holes, but also repair them, Making sure they create perfect holes for future use Application Stainless Steel Die Steel Titanium Alloy Aluminum Alloy Plastic Wood
